description: Commercial and availability terms under which a job opportunity is offered. The proposedConsideration on the core Offer object carries the midpoint or headline compensation figure; this extension provides the full range and period breakdown for display and filtering.

compensation_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the compensation.

compensation_min.description: Lower bound of the compensation range.

compensation_max.description: Upper bound of the compensation range.

compensation_period.description: Pay period for the stated compensation figures.

openings_count.description: Number of positions available under this offer.

application_deadline.description: Latest datetime by which applications will be accepted.

posting_validity.description: Publication window for this offer (start and end datetimes).

probation_period_months.description: Optional probation period in months applicable to this offer. Absence implies no formal probation.

title: HiringJobOfferAttributes
